/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_cli.dir/EU_robot_arm_cli_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_cli.dir/cli_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_cli.dir/ecworker.cpp.o -o EU_robot_arm_cli  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/etherlab/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3 /opt/etherlab/lib/libethercat.so -lpthread
